[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1011000010 4
1 1010110000 4
2 0000000100 1
3 0101000101 4
4 0110101001 5
5 0111011110 7
6 0000101100 3
7 0011011100 5

12 21 0000001100 2
23 32 0011001100 4

56 65 0100000101 3
67 76 0100000001 2
70 07 0110001000 3

13 31 0000101100 3 match 6
24 42 0011010100 4
35 53 0000101100 3 match 6
46 64 0101000100 3
57 75 0100101001 4

71 17 0000101000 2

36 63 0001000100 2
47 74 0110100000 3
50 05 0100001100 3
61 16 0000000100 1 match 2
72 27 0010001000 2
